_note: Labelled eval set for M7 (resume-analysis agreement) + M8 (interview consistency). 'reference' is the human-labelled expectation; 'sampleOutput'/'sampleScores' are stand-in model outputs that let the runner self-check deterministically (--dry-run). In live mode the runner replaces them with real model calls.

resumeSamples.resume_text: Casey Candidate — Frontend engineer. Built accessible React + TypeScript UI components, improved Lighthouse scores, collaborated cross-functionally, shipped to production. B.Eng, University of Ottawa.
Data analyst with SQL, Python, dashboards, A/B testing, and stakeholder reporting across 3 years in fintech.
Product manager: roadmap ownership, user research, prioritization, cross-functional delivery, KPI tracking.

interviewConsistencySamples.question: Tell me about a time you led a project under a tight deadline.
interviewConsistencySamples.answer: Situation: our release slipped... Task: I owned the recovery plan... Action: I re-scoped and parallelized... Result: shipped 2 days early with no Sev-1s.

interviewConsistencySamples.question: What is your biggest weakness?
interviewConsistencySamples.answer: I used to over-commit; I now timebox and renegotiate scope early.
